title: amsinckia douglasiana var. elegans
intro: Amsinckia douglasiana var. elegans, also known as Western dustymaiden or Douglas' amsinckia, is a flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Western dustymaiden include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Western dustymaiden can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
